description_long: This object appears to be a heavily weathered or damaged doll, with a roughly humanoid form and irregular, torn surfaces. The upper section is elongated and tapers to a point, resembling a head or hat, while the midsection is bulkier and uneven, possibly representing a torso. The surface is mottled with shades of brown, tan, and muted red, with some areas appearing smoother and others more textured, as if the material has been worn or melted. There are no clearly defined facial features, limbs, or clothing details visible, suggesting significant wear or abstraction. The base is irregular and flattened, allowing the object to stand upright. The overall appearance is reminiscent of a discarded or deteriorated toy found in an urban environment.
description: A weathered, abstract doll with a rough, torn surface and muted brown and red tones, lacking clear facial or limb details.
description_view_0: The front view shows the elongated, pointed upper section and a bulky, uneven midsection with a mix of smooth and rough textures.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the tapering top and the irregular, folded appearance of the lower section, with more visible surface creases.
description_view_2: The opposite side view reveals the mottled, textured surface and the asymmetrical shape of the midsection.
description_view_3: The rear view displays the most irregular, rough surface, with swirling textures and less defined form.
attribute_clothing_style: No discernible clothing style; the surface appears to be a single, tattered layer with no visible garments, patterns, or fashion influences.
attribute_pose: The form is upright with an elongated upper section and a bulkier lower section, lacking distinct head, arm, or leg articulation; the posture is static.
attribute_facial_expression: No visible facial features or expression; the face area is indistinct and featureless.
attribute_hair_style: No visible hair or hairstyle; the head area is smooth and unadorned.
